title: Nurse Clinician
description:
Primary Responsibilities

Assess, plans, implements and evaulates care of patient with complex heatlhcare needs according to updated standards of nursing practice.

- Conducts teaching and counselling for patients and their families/carers.

- Initiates and ensures implementation of dscharge planning for patients with potential discharge.

- Ensures residents care delviery is carried out according to established standards of care and practice. 

- Ensures written policies and SOP is availabe and up to date to guide nursing practices.

- Provides direct care to patients to ensure compliance to standards.

- Ensures smooth transition of patients fromacute to chronic care and back to community where possible.

- Conducts nursing audits on nursing care standards and initiates strategies to resolve non-adherence issues.

- Directs and facilitates staff development, skills and competency upgrading through in-house training, approved online learning or formal education opportunities.

- Guides orientation/induction programmes and preceptorship for new staff.

- Support SNM in nursing home management and deputizes her in her absence.

Secondary Responsibilities

- Acts as a resource person to the nurse manager in clinical nursing and nursing training matters.

- Promotes evidence-based practices or nursing care delivery.

- Demonstrates awareness of current nursing and health care practices.

- Monitors and analyzes trends and changing needs of patients in institutional settings.

- Conducts quality improvement/research projects.

- Champions training/quality improvement projects.

- Contributes to performance appraisals of staff nurse, assistant nurses, nursing aides and healthcare assistant.

- Takes on additional responsibilities or tasks as assigned by Senior Nurse Manager/Director of Nursing.

Qualifications and Experience

  1. Locally Trained Registered Nurse with Advanced Diploma in Nursing/Bachelor’s degree in Nursing or equivalent preferred.
  2. Foreign Trained Registered Nurse with Degree or Diploma in Nursing with Board Pass (Professional Regulation Council, PRC)
  3. Registration with Singapore Nursing Board.

postedCompany.description:
THYE HUA KWAN NURSING HOME LIMITED

HEALTHCARE/ LIFE SCIENCES/ BIOMEDICAL/ PHARMACEUTICAL/ MEDICAL SERVICES

Thye Hua Kwan Nursing Home @ Hougang will serve 285 residents, including 114 residents with dementia.  We believe in providing the best quality of life for aging Singaporeans and will strive to facilitate aging in the community. To do that, the Nursing Home will consider all psychosocial, physical, medical and emotional aspects of our clients and create a tranquil, person-centred and safe environment for them.

With our mission "To serve Mankind", Thye Hua Kwan endeavors to help anyone who needs help with full respect to their race, creed, language, culture and religion, to assist them in every way possible.
